content: [{'text': "Good, still moving west. The robot is now roughly above the green destination. I can see the green marker is in the middle corridor below. I need to find a way south through the black wall. Looking at the map, the black wall between the upper and middle corridors appears to have a gap somewhere. Let me continue west to find the passage, or I may need to look for a vertical corridor on the left side.\n\nLet me keep moving west — the destination is at x=3.98, and I'm at x=7.58, so I still need to go further left.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01AaiVqHcLpeJkyeUk3PyDoA', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'distance_meters': 1.0}, 'name': 'move_forward', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
